sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, data String, value Float64);

SELECT id, data, multiSearchAllPositionsCaseInsensitiveUTF8(data, ['\x63']) AS positions FROM test_table WHERE multiSearchAllPositionsCaseInsensitiveUTF8(data, ['\x63']) NOT IN (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL);
SELECT id, data FROM test_table WHERE value NOT IN (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE multiSearchAllPositionsCaseInsensitiveUTF8(data, ['\x41']) = 0);
SELECT id, COUNT(*) FROM test_table GROUP BY multiSearchAllPositionsCaseInsensitiveUTF8(data, ['\x63']) HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE data IS NULL);
SELECT id, multiSearchAllPositionsCaseInsensitiveUTF8(data, ['\x68', '\x48']) AS positions FROM temp_table WHERE value NOT IN (3, 1.0, NULL) AND positions[1] IS NOT NULL;

SELECT id, multiSearchAllPositionsCaseInsensitiveUTF8(data, ['\x6c\x69\x63']) FROM test_table WHERE (data NOT IN (SELECT data FROM test_table WHERE data != '')) AND (multiSearchAllPositionsCaseInsensitiveUTF8(data, ['\x43']) = 0 OR multiSearchAllPositionsCaseInsensitiveUTF8(data, ['\x68']) > 0);
ALTER TABLE test_table ADD COLUMN description String;
UPDATE test_table SET description = 'Test description' WHERE id = 1;
